claims.summary: Connection and exponential backoff do not by themselves establish current semantic contact.
claims.disposition: Verified that current source keeps socket connection/backoff separate from payload and freshness evidence.

claims.summary: First valid payload and latest valid arrival should be tracked independently across reconnects.
claims.disposition: Verified first-valid timing/entropy, latest valid arrival, connection reset, and legacy-deserialization tests.

claims.summary: Malformed or stale packets should be visible without falsely declaring the socket dead.
claims.disposition: Verified parse-error accounting and an exact stale-sensory-without-dead-socket regression.

claims.summary: A last-seen watchdog should automatically reconnect an open but stale sensory socket.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because forced reconnection changes live sensory transport and fallback behavior.
